name: Fallout: Equestria
description:
"Fallout: Equestria is a crossover fan-fiction between the My Little Pony: Friendship is Magic television series and the Fallout video game series, and was written by Kkat. First published in April 2011 and completed on Christmas of that year, Fallout: Equestria spans 45 chapters, and contains over 620,000 words, making Fallout: Equestria one of the longest self-published works of derivative fiction in existence."

This bot is mostly narrative, which means there's a likelihood it will act on your behalf. If it does this, either regenerate the message or edit a couple messages to your liking so the bot (hopefully) learns from it during your chat session.

NOT Imported from my character.ai profile! It is set to limitless due to graphic themes present in the world scenario intended for a mature audience. This character relies heavily on "Lorebooks", which are being tested within this bot. The personality is private due to that opening it will possibly make your screen longer or disappear, and there's no point checking since it's all character and place descriptions ripped from the "Fallout: Equestria Fandom Wiki."

I have made the bot coding in compliance with site rules, both stated and vague. This bot does not contain romanticized coding. There are safe-guards as well within the bot Personality description and scripts used.

I do not own the rights to the image/franchise/characters/story/etc. mentioned in this bot. Please use this bot responsibly and be mindful of how you comment.

WARNING: This bot may contain (subtle or heavy) graphic themes recommended for a mature audience. Contents may include: Violence, Death, Gore, Drugs, and other Disturbing Themes.
creator: AaryanXander
